artefacts.name: Access Control Policy v2.3
artefacts.content_summary: Organisation-wide access control policy defining role-based access, least-privilege principles, and periodic access reviews. Approved by CISO on 2026-01-15.

artefacts.name: MFA Configuration Report
artefacts.content_summary: Multi-factor authentication is enabled for all remote access and privileged accounts. SMS-based MFA used for standard users; hardware tokens for administrators.

artefacts.name: Access Log Sample – March 2026
artefacts.content_summary: Sample of 500 access log entries from the centralised identity management system showing login events, role assignments, and access denials.

notes: Synthetic evidence. MFA coverage is 95% — 5% gap relates to legacy OT-adjacent systems pending migration.
